get.description: Search managed content for the specified parameters.

parameters.description: Organization group code.
parameters.name: locationgroupcode

parameters.description: Organization group id.
parameters.name: locationgroupid

parameters.description: Searches for the string value in the File Name.
parameters.name: queryString

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Category.
parameters.name: categoryId

parameters.description: Filter contents by Mime Type.
parameters.name: mimeType

parameters.description: Filter by Contents that are going to expire within days specified.
parameters.name: expiresIn

parameters.description: Sort the result based on a property. Accepts "Name", "Size", "Author", "DownloadPriority", "IsRequired", "IsActive", "EffectiveDate", "ExpirationDate", "ModifiedOn", or "ModifiedBy". By default it sorts by "Name"..
parameters.name: sortBy

parameters.description: Sort direction. By default it sorts Ascending.
parameters.name: sortAscending

parameters.description: Start index of page.
parameters.name: sortIndex

parameters.description: Specifies the number of results returned per Page.
parameters.name: pageSize

400.description: Bad Request 1. {3043: Please provide a valid Location Group Id or Code.} 2. {3032: You've sent invalid search criteria, look at the value of parameter '{0}'.}

403.description: Forbidden 1. {3047: You don't have permissions to access this Location Group.}

412.description: Precondition Failed 1. {3050: File is already under the category specified.} 2. {3053: Category not found or has subcategories, you can only add a file to a leaf category.} 3. {3051: Dates must be between 1/1/1753 12:00:00 AM and 12/31/9999 11:59:59 PM.}

post.description: Uploads a file to specified OG.

parameters.description: File name for the uploaded file.(Required)
parameters.name: fileName

parameters.description: The category for the file.(Required)
parameters.name: categoryId

parameters.description: The effective date for the file.(Required)
parameters.name: effectiveDate

parameters.description: The ID of the organization group.(Required)
parameters.name: locationGroupId

parameters.description: The group code of the organization group.(Required)
parameters.name: locationGroupCode

400.description: Bad Request 1. {3009: Provide file name along with extension.} 2. {3046: Invalid category Id.}

403.description: Forbidden 1. {3001: You don't have permission to access this resource.} 2. {3006: This file type falls under restricted extension list.}

412.description: Precondition Failed. 1. {3058: Effective Date must be greater than or equal to today's date.} 2. {3063: You cannot upload an empty file.} 3. {3056: File size is larger than maximum allowed size.} 4. {3055: You have exceeded the storage limit for your Organization Group.} 5. {3061: Category has at least one Sub Category.} 6. {3057: Given combination of Category and File Name is not unique.}

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the file.(Required).
parameters.name: id

400.description: Bad Request 1. {3018: You have sent invalid file id.}

400.description: Bad Request 1. {3077: Please provide valid Smart Groups under Assignment settings.} 2. {3050: File is already under the category specified.} 3. {3053: Category not found or has subcategories, you can only add a file to a leaf category.} 4. {3051: Dates must be between 1/1/1753 12:00:00 AM and 12/31/9999 11:59:59 PM.}

403.description: Forbidden 1. {3001: You don't have permission to access this resource.} 2. {6001: The administrator has not opted to use smart groups for assignments. Request you to use the AWContents V1 API}

404.description: Not Found 1. {3078: Content not found.}

put.summary: New - Update metadata for a Managed content.

get.description: Returns the admin storage information like content capacity.
get.summary: Returns Admin storage information of that OG.
